recentNews.headline: Alphabet Q1 2026: revenue +22% to $109.9B, Google Cloud surges 63% to $20.0B
recentNews.whyItMatters: Eleventh straight quarter of double-digit growth, with Cloud acceleration and 36.1% operating margin signaling AI investments are converting to revenue, not just cost. Cloud backlog topped $460B.

recentNews.headline: Alphabet raises 2026 capex guidance to $180-190B
recentNews.whyItMatters: An increase from the prior $175-185B range and more than double 2025 spend, underscoring the scale of Alphabet's AI infrastructure bet and pressuring near-term free cash flow.

recentNews.headline: YouTube ad revenue hits $9.88B in Q1, up from $8.93B a year ago
recentNews.whyItMatters: YouTube remains a durable second ad pillar even as AI reshapes Search, with Shorts and connected-TV monetization continuing to scale.

recentNews.headline: At Cloud Next 2026, Google makes Ironwood (7th-gen TPU) GA and previews 8th-gen TPUs
recentNews.whyItMatters: Ironwood positions Google for the 'age of inference' (scales to 9,216 chips/superpod); previewed TPU 8t (training, Broadcom) and 8i (inference, MediaTek) on TSMC 2nm cement a multi-year custom-silicon roadmap vs. Nvidia.

recentNews.headline: Google and Blackstone to create a TPU-based 'neocloud' service
recentNews.whyItMatters: First hyperscaler to offer its AI chips outside its own cloud, opening a new merchant-silicon revenue path and a direct attack on Nvidia's installed base.

recentNews.headline: AI wins have Alphabet poised to become one of the world's most valuable companies
recentNews.whyItMatters: Gemini 3 leadership and Cloud momentum re-rated the stock; Alphabet crossed $4T in January 2026 and traded near $4.6T by mid-2026, second only to Nvidia.

recentNews.headline: Google DeepMind researchers queue for TPUs as Google sells record capacity to Anthropic and Meta
recentNews.whyItMatters: Highlights both the strength of external TPU demand (Anthropic up to ~$40B/5GW; Meta in talks) and an internal supply-constraint risk for Google's own frontier model training.

recentNews.headline: Google unveils Gemini 3.5 Flash at I/O 2026 for agents and coding
recentNews.whyItMatters: Cheaper, faster model extends Gemini's price/performance lead for agentic and developer workloads; serving unit costs fell ~78% over 2025, improving AI gross-margin economics.

recentNews.headline: DOJ and 35 states appeal Search remedy; adtech remedies ruling looms
recentNews.whyItMatters: After the judge rejected a forced Chrome divestiture, the DOJ/states appeal seeks tougher structural remedies; the separate adtech case (Judge Brinkema) still threatens divestiture of Google's ad-exchange business — a multi-year overhang.
